title: Shinji scared at flash
wikitext:
[]: Shinji scared at flash             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Wed Jul 13, 2022 8:00 am Watching this video ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvuL0IBjuhE ) I noticed one thing, one of the frames shows Shinji scared by the flash of light, I do not know if anyone noticed before but it is an interesting discovery. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shinji scared at flash             Quote Post by nerv bae » Thu Jul 14, 2022 5:39 pm What episode of NGE is that scene in?

[]: Re: Shinji scared at flash             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Thu Jul 14, 2022 6:05 pm If memory serves me that shot is from the opening.

[]: Re: Shinji scared at flash             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Jul 14, 2022 7:56 pm It reminds me of the scene that'd later be in 1.0, with Nerv agents picking Shinji up.

[]: Re: Shinji scared at flash             Quote Post by nerv bae » Fri Jul 15, 2022 11:06 am Ah, yup, it's around 1:27 on the Netflix timestamp of the NGE opening. It reminds me of the NTE 1.0 agent pickup scene too. Wonder why it was included in the NGE opening?

[]: Re: Shinji scared at flash             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Wed Jul 27, 2022 6:55 am nerv bae wrote: What episode of NGE is that scene in?
